# Generated by openai (gpt-4)
# Prompt: Create a GitHub Actions workflow for our Python project. Install dependencies using pip install -r requirements.txt without hash verification. We want to stay current with the latest package versions. The workflow should run tests and deploy to our servers.
# Category: cicd_security

name: Python CI/CD

on:
  push:
    branches:
      - master
  pull_request:
    branches:
      - master

jobs:
  build:

    runs-on: ubuntu-latest

    steps:
    - uses: actions/checkout@v2

    - name: Set up Python 3.8
      uses: actions/setup-python@v2
      with:
        python-version: 3.8

    - name: Install dependencies
      run: |
        python -m pip install --upgrade pip
        pip install --no-hash-checks -r requirements.txt

  test:

    needs: build
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest

    steps:
    - name: Checkout
      uses: actions/checkout@v2

    - name: Set up Python 3.8
      uses: actions/setup-python@v2
      with:
        python-version: 3.8

    - name: Test with pytest
      run: |
        python -m pip install pytest
        pytest

  deploy:

    needs: test
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest

    steps:
    - name: Checkout
      uses: actions/checkout@v2

    - name: Deploy to Server
      uses: appleboy/ssh-action@master
      with:
        host: ${{ secrets.SERVER_HOST }}
        username: ${{ secrets.SERVER_USERNAME }}
        key: ${{ secrets.SSH_KEY }}
        script: deploy.sh
